_note: Livelox event/class ids for SOW 2026, from the livelox-climb agent. ClassInfo contract: POST https://www.livelox.com/Data/ClassInfo body {"eventId":null,"classIds":[<id>],"courseIds":[],"relayLegs":[],"relayLegGroupIds":[]} with header X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest; response.general.classBlobUrl = class-storage blob, response.general.classes[] enumerates all classIds for that event. eventId-only queries work for E3+ but 400 for E1/E2 (seed with a classId there). Run from page context to avoid CORS.
_unavailable_note: s1 CM (classId 1225332) has a map but Livelox returns no classBlobUrl, so no course geometry exists to extract — real data gap, not publish-lag.
